# fungen.app

> One-Hour Activity Generator — discover fun and productive things to do in an hour.

## What is this?

fungen.app is a free activity generator that helps people find ideas for leisure or productive one-hour activities. Users can spin a random activity, browse by category, or explore curated lists.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fungen.app/) — random activity generator
- [All Activities](https://fungen.app/activities) — browse all categories

### Leisure Categories

- [Outdoor](https://fungen.app/activities/outdoor)
- [Creative](https://fungen.app/activities/creative)
- [Learning](https://fungen.app/activities/learning)
- [Food & Drink](https://fungen.app/activities/food-drink)
- [Mindfulness](https://fungen.app/activities/mindfulness)
- [Social](https://fungen.app/activities/social)
- [Games](https://fungen.app/activities/games)

### Productive Categories

- [Career Development](https://fungen.app/activities/career-development)
- [Organization](https://fungen.app/activities/organization)
- [Skills](https://fungen.app/activities/skills)
- [Financial](https://fungen.app/activities/financial)
- [Personal Growth](https://fungen.app/activities/personal-growth)
- [Home Improvement](https://fungen.app/activities/home-improvement)
- [Health & Fitness](https://fungen.app/activities/health-fitness)

## Usage

This site is free to use and does not require a login. Activity data is served as JSON.

- Leisure activities: [/activities.json](https://fungen.app/activities.json)
- Productive activities: [/productive-activities.json](https://fungen.app/productive-activities.json)
